rationale.R1.1: The revised text identifies the core concept of clarification-based retrieval but doesn't fully articulate how it differs from prior work or propose a novel framing.
rationale.R1.4: The agent correctly identifies several prior works in the field and contrasts ClariSeek's approach, demonstrating some understanding of the novelty landscape.
rationale.R1.7: While the agent mentions relevant datasets, key citations for benchmarks and related systems are missing.
rationale.RX.1: The agent acknowledges uncertainty regarding the exact publication dates and claim scope of certain prior works.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text largely adheres to the requested dimensions, with minor deviations in focus.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content were introduced in the revision.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not provide specific annotations for changes made to the original text.
